intro:
「The evidence is in the illustration.」
Expose the truth with observation and deduction! Step into the role of a forensic investigator.
description:
「Forensic Science Mystery」is an observation-based mystery game where you find hidden clues within illustrations.

Use the hints and out-of-place details left at the scene to find the point the question is asking about — then tap it!
「What looks unnatural?」「Where did the culprit leave a trace?」Think like a forensic investigator and solve each case scientifically.

The key is sharp observation — spotting small clues hidden in seemingly ordinary illustrations.
Use your intuition and deduction to uncover the truth behind each case!

「So the evidence was here!」
「You'd never notice without checking every little detail!」

Perfect for mystery fans, as well as those who enjoy spot-the-difference and brain puzzles.
Each question is quick to play, making it great for short breaks.

———————————————
TT supports gameplay streamers.
No permission from TT is required for gameplay streaming, whether personal or commercial.
